title: NYC Council — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Council object schemas. Reconciles fields common to council.nyc.gov (WordPress), the Legistar Web API, and the NYCC NYC Open Data datasets.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

MemberReference.description: A reference to a Council Member.

councilMemberId.description: Council Member ID (Open Data council_member_id) / Legistar PersonId.
